claim(uint256).details: Claim earned tokens from stake in validator

forceSwap().details: In case swap wont do it and sells/buys might be blocked

isExcludedFromFees(address).details: Check if an address is excluded from the fee calculation

removeLimits().details: Remove limits after token is somewhat stable

startTrading().details: Once live, can never be switched off

unstake(uint256).details: Claim earned and staked tokens from validator

updateFeeReceiver(address).details: Update wallet that receives fees and newly added LP

updateFees(uint256,uint256,uint256).details: Update token fees (max set to initial fee)

updateSwapTokensThreshold(uint256).details: Very important function.  Updates the threshold of how many tokens that must be in the contract calculation for fees to be taken

userClaimHistory(address).details: Returns how much staker has claimed over time

userEarned(address,uint256).details: Returns how much staker has earned

userStaked(address,uint256).details: Returns how much staker is staking

withdrawContractETH().details: Transfer eth stuck in contract to _swapFeeReceiver
